item.title: Jain Resource Recycling Q4 FY26: Sharp Profit Decline Raises Valuation Concerns Despite Revenue Growth
item.description: Jain Resource Recycling Ltd., a small-cap player in the non-ferrous metals sector, reported a concerning quarter-on-quarter profit decline in Q4 FY26, with consolidated net profit falling 47.70% to ₹66.03 crores from ₹126.25 crores in Q3 FY26. Despite achieving record quarterly revenue of ₹3,104.98 crores—an 11.88% sequential increase—the company witnessed severe margin compression that translated into sharply lower profitability. The stock responded with a dramatic 18.04% decline on May 18, 2026, closing at ₹463.85, as investors reassessed the sustainability of the company's premium valuation in light of deteriorating operational metrics. Time: May 18 2026 09:46 PM IST

item.title: Tirupati Forge Q4 FY26: Strong Revenue Growth Offset by Margin Compression
item.description: Tirupati Forge Ltd., a Gujarat-based manufacturer of closed die forged products and flanges, reported a mixed performance for the quarter ended March 2026, with robust revenue expansion tempered by declining profitability. The micro-cap company posted net profit of ₹1.52 crores for Q4 FY26, representing a sequential decline of 24.75% from ₹2.02 crores in Q3 FY26, though marking a year-on-year improvement of 16.92% from ₹1.30 crores in Q4 FY25. Time: May 18 2026 09:46 PM IST

item.title: Monte Carlo Fashions Q4 FY26: Profit Plunges 149% Despite Revenue Growth
item.description: Monte Carlo Fashions Ltd., the Ludhiana-based branded apparel manufacturer, reported a dramatic collapse in profitability for Q4 FY26, with consolidated net profit plummeting 148.65% year-on-year to ₹5.03 crores from a loss of ₹10.34 crores in the corresponding quarter last year. The micro-cap company, valued at ₹1,166 crores, saw its stock decline 2.81% to ₹562.95 following the results announcement, reflecting investor concerns over deteriorating margins despite a 36.11% surge in quarterly revenue. Time: May 18 2026 09:46 PM IST

item.title: Strides Pharma Q4 FY26: Robust Profit Growth Masks Margin Volatility Concerns
item.description: Strides Pharma Science Ltd., a mid-tier pharmaceutical manufacturer with a market capitalisation of ₹10,503 crores, delivered a strong fourth quarter performance for FY26, reporting consolidated net profit of ₹126.94 crores—a sequential decline of 37.19% from Q3 FY26's exceptional ₹202.11 crores, but a robust 54.45% year-on-year surge from Q4 FY25's ₹82.19 crores. The stock, trading at ₹1,150.35, has delivered remarkable returns of 74.30% over the past year, significantly outperforming both the Sensex and the pharmaceuticals sector. Time: May 18 2026 09:46 PM IST
